title: Sitnasuak Native Corporation Authorizes Conveyance of ANCSA Land into SNC Trust
summary: Nome, Alaska | November 23, 2022 Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) announces their plan to convey 12,212 acres of land into the SNC Settlement Trust (SNC Trust or Trust).
